zh.text: Zither Harp
背負我這一生的流光
不亂不慌 不悲不傷
情人紅黃 沒有你的目光
只剩下空蕩
聽說我這一生的風霜
不爭不強 不失不忘
盡目驕傲 沒有你的陽光
空氣只留下熱浪
萬物皆無光 只有你的也明亮
隨心去遠方 看看太陽
萬物皆悲傷 只有你的沒傷痒
等你推移一晚夜光
來時寫風雨 許時帶走了四季
你不再在好的風景皆無力
開始洶湧來行 後來卻沈日去
你不來 在美的天地 都冷靜
Zither Harp

Zither Harp

en.text: Congratulations.
The light is red, there is no light for you
There is only space left
Listen to the wind and frost in my life
Not true, not false, not forgotten
There is no sunlight without you
There is only space left
There is no end, no light, only your bright eyes
Go to the distance with interest, look at the sun
Full of sadness, only your beauty
Wait for you to retire, a thousand nights
Come to eat, write the wind and rain, bring your own
You are not in the best scenery, but in the fog
Start to use your heart, then decide to go
You are not in the best scenery, but in the fog

There is no sunlight without you
